memoryArtifacts.headline: Robert Moulton, 1565 by Myrtle S. Hyde
Moulton, Robert story 1565-1633
memoryArtifacts.description: When Robert Moulton was born in 1565 in Norfolk, England, his father, Thomas, was 30 and his mother, Joanna, was 33. He married Mary Smith and they had 19 children together. He then married Anne Green …

memoryArtifacts.headline: Benjamin and Mary Moulton by Myrtle S. Hyde

popularStory.headline: Sharon's Notes
popularStory.description:
From NEHGS REGISTER 1990 p 132
It may be of interest to note that neither Robert Moulton (Thomas, Robert) nor his father Thomas appear to have been the poor farmers indicated by some of the documents …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Moulton於大約1565年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特時，他的父親Thomas Moulton54歲，母親Joanna Greene37歲。他於1595年5月15日與Mary Smythe在英國諾福爾可姆斯比結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1565年住在英國諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特。他在英國諾福爾可被列為husbandman。他去世於從1633年10月8日到1633年10月11日在英國諾福爾可史可拉特比，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特武德內斯波洛聖 瑪麗 馮 維金 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Moulton于大约1565年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特时，他的父亲Thomas Moulton54岁，母亲Joanna Greene37岁。他于1595年5月15日与Mary Smythe在英国諾福爾可姆斯比结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1565年住在英国諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特。他在英国諾福爾可被列为husbandman。他去世于从1633年10月8日到1633年10月11日在英国諾福爾可史可拉特比，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特武德內斯波洛聖 瑪麗 馮 維金 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Moulton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Cheshire and Lancashire): habitational name from one or more of the places called Moulton (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, North Yorkshire), most of which are named with the Old English personal name Mūl(a), the Old Norse personal name Múli, or Old English mūl ‘mule’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Molden
meanings: metronymic from the Middle English female personal name Mold, a form of Maud, with the characteristically West Midland genitival suffix -en.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Moulton was born about 1565, in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Moulton, was 54 and his mother, Joanna Greene, was 37. He married Mary Smythe on 15 May 1595, in Hemsby, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He lived in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England in 1565. His occupation is listed as husbandman in Norfolk, England. He died from 8 October 1633 to 11 October 1633, in Scratby, Norfolk, England, and was buried in St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Moulton est né environ 1565, à Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Moulton, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Joanna Greene, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Mary Smythe le 15 mai 1595, à Hemsby, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il a vécu à Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Angleterre en 1565. Sa profession de son indiquée est husbandman à Norfolk, Angleterre. Il est décédé du 8 octobre 1633 au 11 octobre 1633, à Scratby, Norfolk, Angleterre, et a été enterré à St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Moultonが約1565年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクオルメスビー サイント マーガレットで生まれた時，父Thomas Moultonは54歳，母Joanna Greeneは37歳であった。1595年5月15日にイギリスノーフォルクヘムスビーでMary Smytheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1565年にはイギリスノーフォルクオルメスビー サイント マーガレットに住んでいた。イギリスノーフォルクでの職業はhusbandmanと記録されている。彼はから1633年10月8日まで1633年10月11日にイギリスノーフォルクスクラトビーで死去し，イギリスイギリスケントウッドネスボロウスト. マリー ス バージン チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Moulton(이)가 대략 1565년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Moulton(은)는 54세였고, 그의 어머니 Joanna Greene(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1595년 5월 15일 영국 노르폴크 헤스비에서 Mary Smythe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1565년도에 영국 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿에서 살았다. 그의 직업은 영국 노르폴크에서 husbandman이었다. 그는 1633년 10월 8일부터 1633년 10월 11일까지 영국 노르폴크 스크라트비에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 우드네스버루그h 스트. 메리 테 버긴 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Moulton nasceu aproximadamente 1565, em Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Moulton, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Joanna Greene, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Smythe em 15 de maio de 1595, em Hemsby, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele viveu em Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Inglaterra em 1565. Sua profissão aparece como husbandman em Norfolk, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu de 8 de outubro de 1633 a 11 de outubro de 1633, em Scratby, Norfolk, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Moulton родился около 1565 г. в местности ормесби сеинт маргарет, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Moulton было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Joanna Greene, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Smythe 15 мая 1595 г. в местности хемсби, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он жил в местности ормесби сеинт маргарет, норфолк, Англия в 1565 году.  Он работал по профессии husbandman в местности норфолк, Англия. Он умер с 8 октября 1633 по 11 октября 1633 в местности скратби, норфолк, Англия и был похоронен в местности ст. мэри т виргин чурчярд, вуднесбороую, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Moulton nació aproximadamente 1565, en Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Moulton, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Joanna Greene, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Mary Smythe el 15 de mayo de 1595, en Hemsby, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Vivió en Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Inglaterra en 1565. Su ocupación registrada era husbandman en Norfolk, Inglaterra. Murió desde 8 de octubre de 1633 hasta 11 de octubre de 1633, en Scratby, Norfolk, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
